ai_profile:
**Down The Rabbit Hole 2026: A Celebration of Diversity and Sound**  

Taking place from July 3rd to 5th, 2026, *Down The Rabbit Hole* returns with an eclectic lineup of 39 artists, representing a wide spectrum of genres and backgrounds. From the pulsating beats of Electronic and Techno to the emotive sounds of Indie Rock, Folk, and Hip-Hop, the festival promises a rich musical tapestry that caters to every taste. With seven Electronic acts leading the charge, closely followed by Indie Rock and Folk, the festival balances cutting-edge sounds with timeless genres.  

The lineup highlights a strong international presence, with artists hailing from 15 countries. The United Kingdom and United States lead the charge with eight acts each, while the Netherlands makes a strong local showing with six. Adding to the global flavor, artists from Ireland, France, Thailand, Turkey, DR Congo, and Japan will bring unique cultural influences to the stage. Gender diversity is also celebrated, with female and mixed-gender acts making up over a third of the lineup, ensuring a variety of voices are heard.  

In addition to its musical variety, *Down The Rabbit Hole 2026* shines a spotlight on underrepresented voices, with nearly a quarter of the acts featuring artists of color. With 100% of the lineup connected to Spotify, attendees have the chance to explore the full breadth of the festival’s offerings ahead of time. A melting pot of genres, cultures, and perspectives, this year’s festival is set to be a vibrant celebration of diversity and discovery.
